goal: Enable a harmless read-only file picker preview flow on the Config page without making the selected file active, persistent, writable, or a source for app reloads.

filePickerImplementation.behavior: Selected paths are stored only in local ConfigSelectionState preview state and displayed in the Config page.

previewStateBehavior: Selected file is shown under Selected for review.
Preview copy says this has not changed what the app will write.
Preview copy says the selection is not saved yet.
The selected path is not used to rebuild UiProjection, ConfigDiscovery, or CurrentConfigSnapshot.
clearPreviewBehavior: Clear selected file hides the preview area and clears the selected path label.
No files, symlinks, runtime state, or app data sources are changed.

sourceFollowPreview.behavior: Shown as disabled future controls only.

uiChanges: Choose Config File... is now an active preview-only button.
A selected path appears in a preview-only area.
The preview area includes clear/cancel behavior through Clear selected file.
Source-follow choices are visible but disabled.
The Config page still says selected previews do not change writes and are not saved.

validation.gitStatusShort: passed; only current sprint files plus pre-existing untracked local audit/design artifacts were present before commit

proofUsed: src/config_selection.rs preview-only state model from prior sprint
proofStillMissing: Manual config selection is not persisted.
Selected config previews do not reload app data.
Selected config previews do not affect write targets.
Profile switching and layered writes are not implemented.
nextRecommendedSprint: Add a read-only preview inspection panel for the selected file, still without persistence, profile switching, app reload, or write-target selection.
